_notes: COMMITTED, machine-independent IDENTITY + WIRING only. Same for every developer + CI on this project.

Jetrix is the SOURCE OF TRUTH. This file records how the local workspace maps to a Jetrix project and its apps — it does NOT hold project content (glossary, scope, features, context). That lives in .jetrix/cache/, gitignored, refreshed by /delivery-os:jetrix-pull.

environments are PROJECT-level (dev/staging/uat/prod). Each app maps every environment to one of ITS OWN branch names via env_branches — this is the mapping CI reconciliation and environment promotion consume.
apps[] is empty at greenfield bind. Once the user creates apps in Jetrix (repo + env→branch mapping), a /delivery-os:jetrix-pull refreshes this array. type: frontend | backend | mobile | service.
app.type 'monorepo' or a single app with slug '*' represents one repo holding the whole project.
local_root is an OPTIONAL local checkout path for an app's repo when it sits under this workspace; null when the repo lives elsewhere.
NEVER put tokens, passwords, or connection secrets here. Only names/refs/branches. Secrets stay in the developer's local Jetrix MCP config.
